channel.title: XergioAleX - CTO & Co-founder at DailyBot (YC S21)
channel.description: Sergio Alexander Florez Galeano — CTO & Co-founder at DailyBot (YC S21). Full Stack Developer, MSc in Data Science, speaker, maker, and tech entrepreneur with 10+ years building digital products.

item.title: Meteor App: Live Chat
item.description: Building a real-time live chat application with Meteor.js.

item.title: Meteor.js
item.description: Introduction to Meteor.js — a full-stack, open source platform for building web and mobile apps in JavaScript.

item.title: NoSQL and MongoDB
item.description: Introduction to NoSQL databases and building applications with MongoDB.

item.title: Blockchain and Cryptocurrencies
item.description: Exploring blockchain technology, Ethereum, and the world of cryptocurrencies.

item.title: The Internet of Things
item.description: An overview of IoT technologies, protocols, and real-world applications.

item.title: Tensorflow
item.description: Introduction to artificial intelligence using Google's TensorFlow neural network library.

item.title: What is Blockchain and How Will It Transform the Economy?
item.description: Understanding blockchain technology and its potential to radically transform the economy.

item.title: Microservices Architecture and APIs with GraphQL
item.description: Building modern microservices architectures using GraphQL for API communication.

item.title: Introduction to AI and Deep Learning
item.description: Getting started with artificial intelligence and deep learning concepts and tools.

item.title: Blockchain in the Economy
item.description: How blockchain technology is transforming and disrupting traditional economic models.

item.title: Deep Learning: From Academia to Practice
item.description: Bridging the gap between academic deep learning research and practical industry applications. Presented at PyCon.

item.title: WebVR with A-Frame
item.description: Creating immersive 360-degree web experiences using A-Frame and JavaScript.

item.title: Deep Learning: From Academia to Practice (Extended)
item.description: Extended version exploring deep learning models driving AI evolution toward industry optimization.

item.title: Blockchain: The Industrial Revolution of the Internet
item.description: A deep dive into blockchain as a transformative technology, looking beyond Bitcoin.

item.title: Welcome to NodeSchool Day Pereira
item.description: Opening talk for NodeSchool Day Pereira, a community event for learning Node.js.

item.title: Introduction and History of Blockchain and Bitcoin
item.description: A comprehensive introduction to the history and fundamentals of blockchain technology and Bitcoin.

item.title: Introduction to GoLang
item.description: Getting started with Go programming language — syntax, concurrency, and building efficient applications.

item.title: Analyzing the Bitcoin Paper by Satoshi Nakamoto
item.description: A detailed analysis of the original Bitcoin whitepaper written by Satoshi Nakamoto.

item.title: Welcome to Pereira Tech Talks
item.description: Inaugural welcome talk for Pereira Tech Talks, building the local tech community.

item.title: Introduction to Vue.js
item.description: Getting started with Vue.js — a progressive JavaScript framework for building user interfaces.

item.title: Introduction to APIs with GraphQL
item.description: Building modern, flexible APIs using GraphQL — query language and runtime for APIs.

item.title: Divide and Conquer: Microservices and Docker
item.description: Strategies for breaking monolithic applications into microservices using Docker containers.

item.title: Microservices Architecture and Containers with Docker
item.description: Building and deploying microservices using Docker containers and orchestration tools.

item.title: Django Girls Pereira: Closing Talk
item.description: Closing talk for Django Girls Pereira event — encouraging community participation and continued learning.

item.title: Docker Introduction
item.description: Introduction to Docker — containerization concepts, microservices architecture, and practical Docker workflows.

item.title: Introduction to Webpack
item.description: Getting started with Webpack — module bundling, loaders, plugins, and build optimization.

item.title: Introduction to Serverless with Emphasis on IoT
item.description: Exploring serverless architectures and their application in Internet of Things projects.

item.title: Let's Talk About Flutter
item.description: Introduction to Flutter SDK for cross-platform mobile development — building beautiful native apps.

item.title: Serverless, IoT and Conversational Interfaces
item.description: Combining serverless computing, IoT devices, and voice interfaces for intelligent applications.

item.title: WebVR with A-Frame (UniRemington Talk)
item.description: Creating 360-degree web experiences with A-Frame and JavaScript. Presented at UniRemington.

item.title: CSS Grid Layout
item.description: Mastering CSS Grid Layout — techniques, tricks, and practical patterns for modern web layouts.

item.title: Vue Vixens Talk: Styles in Vue
item.description: Exploring styling approaches and best practices in Vue.js applications.

item.title: Introduction to MyPy
item.description: Adding type checking to Python code with MyPy — improving code quality and catching bugs early.

item.title: Building an Async-First Culture with DailyBot
item.description: How we leveraged DailyBot to build a truly asynchronous-first culture across distributed teams, reducing meetings by 60% while increasing alignment.

item.title: How We Got Into Y Combinator
item.description: The journey of getting accepted into Y Combinator — lessons learned, tips, and the application process.

item.title: Building the XergioAleX Brand: The Ninja Coder Identity
item.description: The story behind the XergioAleX personal brand — from concept to execution. A deep dive into the ninja coder logo, its symbolism, color palette, and complete style guide.

item.title: Autonomous Line-Following Robot
item.description: A robotics project combining Arduino, computer vision, and PID control to build an autonomous line-following robot capable of navigating complex tracks at high speed.

item.title: Looking for Product Market Fit
item.description: Strategies and lessons learned in the search for product-market fit as a startup founder.

item.title: The Rebirth of Artificial Intelligence
item.description: Exploring the history and latest advances in AI, including how OpenAI and ChatGPT are transforming development.

item.title: DevOps Infrastructure Toolkit
item.description: An open source collection of Docker, Terraform, and CI/CD templates designed to streamline infrastructure setup for startups and small teams.

item.title: How We Integrated AI into DailyBot's Workflow Engine
item.description: A technical deep-dive into how we brought LLM-powered intelligence to DailyBot's workflow automation, from architecture decisions to production deployment.

item.description: Exploring Astro's impact on web development - building fast websites with TailwindCSS integration.

item.title: Trading Journal - Week 1: Starting the Journey
item.description: My first week of trading — setting up the workspace, learning the basics, and establishing a trading routine that works.

item.title: Lessons from My First Month of Trading
item.description: Key insights and takeaways after one month of active trading — what worked, what didn't, and what I'd do differently.
